q: For an ideal fluid, there must be laminar flow and no ___.
The density of an ideal fluid is ___.
The mass flowing in section 1 must equal the mass flowing in ___.
Volume flow rate $\frac{V}{t}$ is the ___ throughout the pipe.
The equation $A_1 v_1 = A_2 v_2$ states that the liquid entering one end of the pipe leaves from the other end with a constant ___.
The equation $A_1 v_1 = A_2 v_2$ is known as the equation of ___ for fluid flow.
The larger the area of the pipe, the ___ is the speed.
The smaller the area of the pipe, the ___ is the speed.
The speed of water spraying from a hose increases by making the hose area ___.
